checkpoints.name: IDEMPOTENCY
checkpoints.finding: All write operations use overwrite mode.

checkpoints.name: ERROR_HANDLING
checkpoints.finding: No try/except blocks around pipeline stages.
checkpoints.fix: Wrap each pipeline stage in try/except blocks.

checkpoints.name: PARTITION_PRUNING
checkpoints.finding: Read operations are filtered by date/partition column.

checkpoints.name: ROW_COUNT_LOGGING
checkpoints.finding: No row count logging after transformation stages.
checkpoints.fix: Add logging statements to log row counts after each transformation.

checkpoints.name: BUSINESS_RULES
checkpoints.finding: Revenue calculation includes all statuses, not just 'COMPLETED'.
checkpoints.fix: Filter by status='COMPLETED' in revenue calculation.

checkpoints.name: NULL_HANDLING
checkpoints.finding: No NULL checks on primary key and critical columns.
checkpoints.fix: Add NULL checks on primary key and critical columns.

checkpoints.name: BROADCAST_HINT
checkpoints.finding: broadcast() not used on merchant dimension join.
checkpoints.fix: Use broadcast() on merchant dimension join.

checkpoints.name: HARDCODED_PATHS
checkpoints.finding: File paths are hardcoded as strings.
checkpoints.fix: Use parameters instead of hardcoded paths.

checkpoints.name: SCHEMA_VALIDATION
checkpoints.fix: Add schema validation checks before transforming.

checkpoints.name: DEDUPLICATION
checkpoints.finding: No explicit dedup logic on transaction_id in Silver layer.
checkpoints.fix: Add explicit dedup logic on transaction_id.

checkpoints.name: METADATA_OUTPUT
checkpoints.finding: Pipeline writes a run summary JSON at the end.

checkpoints.name: IMPORTS
checkpoints.finding: All imports are present and specific.

top_3_fixes: Add try/except blocks around each pipeline stage.
Filter by status='COMPLETED' in revenue calculation.
Add explicit dedup logic on transaction_id in Silver layer.
